verifyEmail.title: Confirm your email
verifyEmail.descPart2: Check your Spam folder if you don't see it.

telegramLogin.title: Sign in with Telegram
telegramLogin.desc: Open the Meality bot — it signs you in instantly, no password needed.
telegramLogin.hint: In Telegram tap «Start», then the «Open Meality» button — you'll return to the site already signed in.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.desc: Enter your email — we'll send a reset code.

reset.title: New password
reset.descPart2: Enter the code and set a new password.

telegram.noToken: No token provided. Return to Telegram and request a new link.
telegram.errorDefault: Link is invalid or expired. Request a new one in the bot.

yandexCallback.declined: You did not grant access. Please try again.
yandexCallback.badState: Security check failed. Please start sign-in again.
yandexCallback.failed: Could not sign in with Yandex.

consent.continueNote: By continuing, you accept the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
